title: Health anxiety - NHS
text:
n choose to pay for your therapy privately. The cost of private therapy sessions varies, but it can cost from £35 upwards per session.
Free therapy or low-cost sessions starting at £15 are sometimes available. Find out more from these charities:
Mind: How to find therapy or counselling Anxiety UK: Therapy services The British Association for Behavioural and Cognitive Psychotherapies has a register of all accredited therapists in the UK , and The British Psychological Society has a directory of chartered psychologies , some of whom specialise in CBT.
More help for mental health 
Read more about getting help for anxiety, fear and panic . The mental health charity Mind has information on anxiety and panic attacks . 
Video: Talking therapies for stress, anxiety and depression 
Animated video explaining self-referral to psychological therapies services for stress, anxiety or depression. Includes British Sign Language (BSL) translation.
